channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CJI Clarifies No Plea Filed on Police Action During CJP Protests
item.description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant clarified that no petition seeking the Supreme Court’s intervention into alleged police excesses during the July 20 crackdown on student protesters in Delhi had...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Builds Rental Houses in Thika Using Gulf Savings with Father's Help
item.description: Wacuka Waigi, a Kenyan woman working in Dubai, has turned her Gulf earnings into rental properties in Thika by trusting her father to oversee the construction. Her journey, documented through TikTok p...

item.title: GOP Lawmakers Struggle to Defend Trump's Legacy Amid Summer Recess
item.description: Republican lawmakers in the U.S. House of Representatives faced scrutiny during their summer recess as they struggled to defend President Donald Trump's actions and legacy. During a live interview wit...

item.title: Northern Ontario MPPs push for completion of Highway 69 widening project
item.description: The article discusses the launch of the 'Zero Excuses' campaign by Northern Ontario MPPs to accelerate the completion of the Highway 69 widening project. The initiative comes amid concerns over delays...

item.title: Researchers document orca teamwork in breaking down sunfish for feeding
item.description: Scientists in the Gulf of California have observed a previously undocumented hunting behavior in orcas, where they use coordinated ramming to process dead sunfish. In two separate incidents, one orca ...

item.title: DJ Warras' Murder Accused Appear in Pre-Trial Hearing
item.description: Two men, Victor Majola and Armando Pacula, are set to appear in the Johannesburg High Court for a pre-trial hearing regarding the murder of DJ Warrick 'DJ Warras' Stock. The incident occurred in the J...

item.title: Limited legislative progress in the Marcos administration's first year of the 20th Congress
item.description: The Marcos administration's legislative agenda has seen limited progress nearly a year into the 20th Congress, with only two of the 53 priority bills endorsed by the Legislative-Executive Development ...

item.title: Senior Comanchero member arrested after eight-year fugitive chase
item.description: Daniel Toutounji, a former senior member of the Comanchero outlaw motorcycle gang, has been arrested at Sydney Airport after evading authorities for over eight years. The 37-year-old was charged with ...

item.title: Indonesia recovers looted cultural artefacts from the US following FBI cooperation
item.description: The FBI director, Kash Patel, has returned a collection of culturally significant artefacts from the Papua region of Indonesia to President Prabowo Subianto. The items, including stone axes and ceremo...

item.title: Legal officer seeks judicial review after dismissal linked to transfer allowance delay
item.description: Lusajo Mwakasege, a former Legal Officer I with Njombe District Council, has been granted leave by the High Court to challenge his dismissal. The court found he has sufficient interest in the employme...

item.title: Seun Onigbinde Criticizes Tinubu Govt's Budgeting Practices and Calls for Transparency
item.description: Seun Onigbinde, co-founder of BudgIT, has criticized the Federal Government's budgeting process under President Bola Tinubu, arguing that the administration doesn't truly believe in the budgets it pre...

item.title: Ontario PC Caucus Divided Over Hotel Expense Scandal and Government Response
item.description: The Ontario Progressive Conservative caucus is deeply divided over the fallout from a hotel expense scandal involving MPP Stan Cho, who billed taxpayers over $160,000 in lodging costs between 2023 and...

item.title: US Trade Groups Push for African Nations in AGOA to Compete with China
item.description: American business groups have urged the Trump administration to include South Africa and Ethiopia in the African Growth and Opportunity Act (AGOA) to enhance US competitiveness with China on the conti...

item.title: India Sees 3.5% Rise in Road Crash Deaths to 183,382 in 2025; States Like Punjab Report Declines
item.description: The Indian government informed the Lok Sabha that road crash deaths rose by 3.5% to 183,382 in 2025, up from 177,175 in 2024. This marks a 25.5% increase over the past decade, with fatalities jumping ...

item.title: Multiple African Nations Address Legal and Political Developments
item.description: The article details several legal and political developments across Africa. In Nigeria, three men received life sentences for their roles in the abduction of students and teachers from schools in Oyo ...

item.title: Leander Paes appointed as ATF player ambassador
item.description: Leander Paes, the renowned Indian tennis player, has been officially designated as the Asian Tennis Federation (ATF) player ambassador. This appointment underscores his significant contributions to th...

item.title: U.S. and Iran Escalate Striking Activity Near Iraq Base, Impacting Global Oil Routes
item.description: The article details escalating military tensions between the United States and Iran following a series of airstrikes. Explosions were reported near a U.S.-hosted base in northern Iraq after the U.S. c...

item.title: Petrol Price Hikes Drive Up Transport Costs in Nigeria
item.description: Petrol prices in Nigeria have surged to record highs, triggering a sharp increase in transport fares across the country. The spike is driven by rising global crude oil prices, exchange rate volatility...

item.title: Centre admits 15 of 39 NTA permanent posts remain vacant
item.description: The Union government informed Parliament that 15 out of 39 permanent positions in the National Testing Agency (NTA) are currently vacant. The education ministry revealed that 73 individuals, including...

item.title: DCI Rescues 48 Women from Sexual Exploitation in Kiser, Rongai, Seizes Equipment
item.description: Detectives from Kenya's Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) have dismantled two sexual exploitation rings in Kiserian and Ongata Rongai, rescuing 48 women and seizing laptops, cameras, and ph...
